payload.note: Global Marine Service Co, incorporated in Iran on January 3, 2011, is listed as Global Marine Service Co on the SDN watchlist with IR-9988 identifier. However, the screened party, Global Marine Services LLC, was incorporated in the US on April 18, 2019 and has GM-1200 identifier. The country mismatch (Iran vs US) combined with date conflict (2011 incorporation vs 2019 incorporation) raises concerns requiring analyst investigation before closure.
evidence_summary: Global Marine Service Co is listed on the SDN watchlist (IR-9988).
The organization was incorporated in Iran on January 3, 2011.
Screened party: Global Marine Services LLC, incorporated April 18, 2019 in the US with GM-1200 identifier.
payload.next_step_rationale: Investigate contradiction and gather additional corroboration.
